name: Nado x xStocks: one deposit, two potential airdrops
description:
$INK is confirmed. The xStocks airdrop isn’t, at least not yet. But a single deposit on Nado can farm points toward both at the same time, which makes this one of the more capital-efficient double-dips in the Hyperliquid-adjacent ecosystem right now.
